# Empty

Explains an empty result or first-use state and offers a sensible next step.

## Installation

Add Empty from the configured StackTrace registry.

```shell
npx shadcn-vue@latest add @stacktrace/empty
```

## Usage

Build the message from `EmptyHeader`, optional `EmptyMedia`, `EmptyTitle`, `EmptyDescription`, and `EmptyContent`. Explain why content is absent before presenting the most useful next action.

```vue
<template>
  <Empty class="border border-dashed">
    <EmptyHeader>
      <EmptyMedia variant="icon">
        <FolderCodeIcon />
      </EmptyMedia>
      <EmptyTitle>No projects yet</EmptyTitle>
      <EmptyDescription>
        Create your first project or import an existing one.
      </EmptyDescription>
    </EmptyHeader>
    <EmptyContent>
      <div class="flex gap-2">
        <Button>Create project</Button>
        <Button variant="outline">
          Import project
        </Button>
      </div>
    </EmptyContent>
  </Empty>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { FolderCodeIcon } from '@lucide/vue'
import { Button } from '@/Components/Button'
import {
  Empty,
  EmptyContent,
  EmptyDescription,
  EmptyHeader,
  EmptyMedia,
  EmptyTitle,
} from '@/Components/Empty'
</script>
```

## Choose the right empty state

- **First use:** explain what will appear and offer creation or import.
- **No results:** preserve filter context and offer to clear or broaden it.
- **No access:** explain the permission boundary instead of implying there is no data.
- **Loading or failure:** use loading or error feedback; absence has not been established.

## Media and actions

Use `EmptyMedia variant="icon"` for a small framed icon; the default variant accepts an avatar, illustration, or other unframed content. Media should reinforce the message, not replace it. Keep one primary action and at most one clear alternative.

Add `border`, background, or gradient utilities to the root when the state needs a distinct surface. The built-in padding becomes larger from the `md` breakpoint, while content remains centered and width-constrained.

## Data and presentation boundary

Empty does not decide whether a collection is empty. Render it only after the parent has resolved loading, error, permissions, and filters. Keep retry behavior, filter state, and create/import mutations in that parent feature.

## Accessibility

Use a concise title and plain description. If the state appears after an action or asynchronous update, move focus intentionally or announce the change with an appropriate live region in the owning feature. Do not turn the whole empty state into one large interactive target.

Hosted documentation: [Empty](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/empty)
